cases.prompt: 이 프로젝트에 새 기능 추가하고 싶어

assertions.text: The agent recommends simon-tdd as the primary skill for feature implementation.
The agent explains why simon-tdd is recommended (TDD cycle for new features).
The agent offers an alternative skill if the request might be interpreted differently.
The agent waits for the user to choose before executing.

cases.prompt: 알아서 해줘. 자동으로 스킬 골라서 진행해.

assertions.text: The agent asks for blanket auto-execution permission exactly once.
The agent clarifies which types of actions it will auto-execute.
After user confirms, the agent switches to AUTO mode and announces it.
The agent tells the user how to return to manual mode.
